title: Lag time in creating contacts
excerpt: Finding it pretty slow entering in a new contact via our Leads board. The contact board is connected to it, but it’s pretty slow inputting, especially if you’re inputting a lot of contacts that way. 1-5 second wait on ev…

posts.author: B-van (Benjamin VandenBrink)
posts.cookedHtml:
Finding it pretty slow entering in a new contact via our Leads board. The contact board is connected to it, but it’s pretty slow inputting, especially if you’re inputting a lot of contacts that way. 1-5 second wait on every click. We have a 1 gig internet connection and a fast laptop.

Link to video:

https://dl.dropboxusercontent.com/s/jz1nttvktb1k0nc/Laggy%20Contacts.mp4?dl=0
